commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=5fce3e5141c5b1737bec78c2e802ae5b5ec37555)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an optional `isHeartbeat` parameter to context-engine `afterTurn` plumbing and passes `bootstrapContextRunKind === "heartbeat"` from the CLI and embedded runner paths.

PR surface: Source +7. Total +7 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection on current main reproduces the contract mismatch: the SDK declares `afterTurn(params).isHeartbeat`, while active runtime delivery paths omit it; I did not run a live heartbeat wake in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor or maintainer follow-up is needed because the PR has a blocking missing caller plus mock-only proof; the external-PR proof gate makes this a human-handled review item rather than an autonomous repair candidate.

target.title: fix: forward isHeartbeat flag to context-engine afterTurn hooks
target.body:
## Summary

- The context-engine `afterTurn` interface declares `isHeartbeat?: boolean` but the two production call sites (`finalizeHarnessContextEngineTurn` and `installContextEngineLoopHook`) never passed it. Heartbeat runs were indistinguishable from regular user turns to context-engine plugins.
- Threaded `isHeartbeat` through both paths: derived from `bootstrapContextRunKind === "heartbeat"` at each call site (CLI runner and embedded attempt runner).

## Verification

- All 25 existing `finalizeHarnessContextEngineTurn` tests pass.
- All 25 existing `installContextEngineLoopHook` tests pass.
- TypeScript compilation clean (`tsgo` no errors).

## Real behavior proof

**Behavior addressed:** The `isHeartbeat` flag is now forwarded to `contextEngine.afterTurn()` so context-engine plugins can distinguish heartbeat runs from user-initiated turns.

**Environment tested:** Node 22.x on Linux, pnpm test.

**Steps run after the patch:** Ran targeted unit tests for both modified functions.

**Evidence after fix:**

```
$ pnpm test src/agents/harness/context-engine-lifecycle.test.ts

 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  25 passed (25)

$ pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/tool-result-context-guard.test.ts -- -t installContextEngineLoopHook

 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  25 passed | 16 skipped (41)
```

**Observed result:** All existing tests pass without modification. The added `isHeartbeat` parameter is compatible with the existing `afterTurn` interface (which already declares the optional field).

**Not tested:** Live heartbeat wake with a real context-engine plugin that consumes `isHeartbeat`. The fix threads the flag through the plumbing layer; end-to-end verification requires a context-engine plugin that actually branches on the flag.
target.author: huangting-xy
